Part.Source: Event Start /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ TableMain.Height = 493 Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CIDNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CIDNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CIDNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = 'Select Cadastro de Cidades' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &CidNom1.SetFocus() EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Select = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Enter /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &InOutCidCod = CidCod &InOutCidCodNomUfe = CidCodNomUfe Return /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CidNom1.Visible = False &CidCod1.Visible = False &CidIBGE1.Visible = False &PaiCod1.Visible = False &CidAreCod1.Visible = False &CidTraCod1.Visible = False &CidTraRaz1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CIDNOM' &CidNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CIDCOD' &CidCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CIDIBGE' &CidIBGE1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PAICOD' &PaiCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CIDARECOD' &CidAreCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CIDTRACOD' &CidTraCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CIDTRARAZ' &CidTraRaz1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CidNom2.Visible = False &CidCod2.Visible = False &CidIBGE2.Visible = False &PaiCod2.Visible = False &CidAreCod2.Visible = False &CidTraCod2.Visible = False &CidTraRaz2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CIDNOM' &CidNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CIDCOD' &CidCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CIDIBGE' &CidIBGE2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PAICOD' &PaiCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CIDARECOD' &CidAreCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CIDTRACOD' &CidTraCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CIDTRARAZ' &CidTraRaz2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CidNom3.Visible = False &CidCod3.Visible = False &CidIBGE3.Visible = False &PaiCod3.Visible = False &CidAreCod3.Visible = False &CidTraCod3.Visible = False &CidTraRaz3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CIDNOM' &CidNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CIDCOD' &CidCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CIDIBGE' &CidIBGE3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PAICOD' &PaiCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CIDARECOD' &CidAreCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CIDTRACOD' &CidTraCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CIDTRARAZ' &CidTraRaz3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CIDNOM' &CidNom2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CIDNOM' &CidNom3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CIDNOM' &CidNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CIDCOD' &CidCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CIDIBGE' &CidIBGE1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PAICOD' &PaiCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CIDARECOD' &CidAreCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CIDTRACOD' &CidTraCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CIDTRARAZ' &CidTraRaz1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CIDNOM' AND not &CidNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CidNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CIDCOD' AND not &CidCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CidCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CIDIBGE' AND not &CidIBGE1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CidIBGE1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PAICOD' AND not &PaiCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PaiCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CIDARECOD' AND not &CidAreCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CidAreCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CIDTRACOD' AND not &CidTraCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CidTraCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CIDTRARAZ' AND not &CidTraRaz1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CidTraRaz1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CIDNOM' AND not &CidNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CidNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CIDCOD' AND not &CidCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CidCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CIDIBGE' AND not &CidIBGE2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CidIBGE2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PAICOD' AND not &PaiCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PaiCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CIDARECOD' AND not &CidAreCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CidAreCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CIDTRACOD' AND not &CidTraCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CidTraCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CIDTRARAZ' AND not &CidTraRaz2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CidTraRaz2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CIDNOM' AND not &CidNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CidNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CIDCOD' AND not &CidCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CidCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CIDIBGE' AND not &CidIBGE3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CidIBGE3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PAICOD' AND not &PaiCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PaiCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CIDARECOD' AND not &CidAreCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CidAreCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CIDTRACOD' AND not &CidTraCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CidTraCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CIDTRARAZ' AND not &CidTraRaz3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CidTraRaz3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub
